channel.title: AI Insights for Canadian Business — Robert Simon
channel.description: Monthly AI insights for Canadian business leaders. Expert analysis of AI breakthroughs, Canadian AI adoption data, and practical implementation strategies from Montreal-based AI Thought Leader Robert Simon.

image.title: AI Insights for Canadian Business — Robert Simon

item.title: AI Insights for July 2026
item.description: Canada launched its "AI for All" strategy on June 4, 2026, with a $2.3 billion investment. This ambitious plan aims to boost GDP by $200 billion and create 250,000 jobs. This analysis cuts through the
